CASE STUDY: AI RECEPTIONIST

Dental Clinic Voice AI.

The Challenge

A multi-location dental practice was losing 30% of new patient leads because they couldn't answer calls during peak hours or after closing. Hiring a 24/7 call center was too expensive and lacked the personal touch needed for patient care.

The Solution

We built a custom Voice AI agent trained on the clinic's specific services, pricing, and insurance policies. The agent was integrated directly into their booking system, allowing it to schedule appointments in real-time without human intervention.

The Result

Leads Captured

+42%

Cost Reduction

-60%

Setup Time

4 Days

exter.ai

An AI-native studio for founders who can't afford to look small. Based in India, shipping worldwide.
